mapper.select:
SELECT p.post_no AS postNo, p.user_id AS userId, p.category, p.title, p.content, DATE_FORMAT(p.reg_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS regDate, p.view_cnt AS viewCnt, p.like_cnt AS likeCnt, p.is_deleted AS isDeleted, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment c WHERE c.post_no = p.post_no AND c.is_deleted = 0) AS commentCnt FROM Community_Post p WHERE p.is_deleted = 0
AND p.category = #{category}
AND p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND p.user_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR p.user_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY p.reg_date DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM community_Like WHERE post_no = #{postNo} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM community_Like WHERE post_no = #{postNo} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE Community_Post SET like_cnt = like_cnt + #{amount} WHERE post_no = #{postNo}
UPDATE Community_Post SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, update_date = NOW() WHERE post_no = #{postNo}
mapper.select: SELECT post_no AS postNo, user_id AS userId, title, category, content, view_cnt AS viewCnt, like_cnt AS likeCnt, reg_date AS regDate, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM community_like WHERE post_no = community_Post.post_no AND user_id = #{userId}) AS isLiked FROM community_Post WHERE post_no = #{postNo}
SELECT user_id FROM Community_Post WHERE post_no = #{postNo}
